text.tspan: SCOR S4 Source Return. Trigger is either an NCR disposition = return (link e04 / diagram 08) or a buyer-initiated return. Authorization gateway requires a supplier RMA number before any goods move; a declined return forces re-disposition in e04. Reason code drives the financial direction at

closure: credit note (supplier fault) reduces payable; debit note (over-delivery / wrong-item / dispute) reduces payable or raises a receivable; both post to the creditor ledger and reverse the GR/IR accrual and commitment for the returned quantity. Closure always feeds the NCR/CAPA loop and the
